description: The Crips are a primarily African-American alliance of street gangs based in Southern California, founded in Los Angeles in 1969 by Raymond Washington and Stanley Williams. They are one of the largest and most violent street gang associations in the United States, with an estimated 30,000 to 35,000 members in 2008. Members are involved in murders, robberies, and drug dealing, and have a long-standing rivalry with the Bloods.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: 41 U.S. states, Canada and Belize
country_links.context: The Crips have territory in Belize.

country_links.evidence_quote: The gang also began to establish a presence in Canada in the early 1990s; Crip sets are active in the Canadian cities of Montreal and Toronto .
country_links.context: The Crips established a presence in Canada, with sets active in Montreal and Toronto.
